system.notes:
Full-body conversion; index ✓118,110. Spec pp.~98-102: BODY 12, MA 12/20 versions, run 40mph, 6 limbs w/ SP25-30; sensor + cyberoptic packages. | [Audit row +223 — Chromebook 3 p.101]

Full Body Conversion (Chromebook 3 p.101). Whole-body cyborg chassis: takes Structural Damage per zone, not the human wound track - Head or Torso destroyed = the borg dies. SP 30 all zones; SDP disabled/destroyed = Head/limbs 20/30, Torso 30/40.

Option spaces: Head optic 0&0, audio 0; Torso 4; R.Arm 0/L.Arm 0; R.Leg 0/L.Leg 0.

Prebuilt options: Maximum-Metal recon suite: 5-optic front mount; head + shoulder sensory booms; acoustic alarm; military radio; parabolic mic; tight-beam laser comm; cellular phone; satellite uplink; raser scanner; A/V recorder; sniffer; radiation detector; remote targeting link; motion detectors; magnetometer; quick-change mount.
